title: Skincare salad in a jar 🥕
description:
📲 TRY OUR APP: pickuplimes.com/app (or search "Pick Up Limes" on the app store)

👀 Find this “Shaved Carrot Salad” recipe in our app to scale the amounts, get step-by-step photo instructions, and find detailed nutrition info. Or find it below:

INGREDIENTS
~ For 2 servings ~

Salad base
* 4 medium carrots†
* ½ cup fresh cilantro, chopped
* ½ avocado, cubed
* ¼ cup unsalted roasted peanuts, chopped
* 1 Tbsp toasted sesame seeds
* 
Dressing
* ½ lime, juiced
* 1 garlic clove, crushed
* 2 Tbsp extra-virgin olive oil
* 1 Tbsp rice vinegar
* 1 Tbsp reduced-sodium soy sauce
* ½ Tbsp maple syrup
* ½ Tbsp toasted sesame oil
* 1 tsp grated fresh ginger

† For us, 4 carrots weighed about 500g. We used a mix of multicoloured carrots (purple, orange, and yellow), though regular orange carrots work perfectly too.

DIRECTIONS
1. In a large jar or bowl, combine the dressing ingredients.
2. Use a vegetable peeler to peel the carrots into long ribbons.
3. Add the remaining salad ingredients to the jar, then layer the shaved carrots on top.
4. Secure the lid and shake, then let sit 5 to 10 minutes so the carrots soften slightly.
5. Enjoy from the jar, or empty into a bowl. Enjoy!

👩🏻‍🍳 SUBSCRIBE: for more deliciousness @PickUpLimes

title: The art of noticing (colour walk) 🌼
description:
A few months back, we were exploring Sydney with our little one. It was summer in Australia, so we spent a lot of time outside, and each day Robin and I would choose a colour to notice as we walked 🌈

As a professional over-thinker (hi hi!), it became such a great way for me to get out of my head and pay closer attention to what was around us. Tiny flowers, painted walls, someone’s jacket… little things I might have otherwise missed 🐝

It’s such a simple little mindfulness activity. Try it the next time you’re outside! 👀

title: THIS is how you do tofu
description:
📲 TRY OUR APP: pickuplimes.com/app (or search "Pick Up Limes" on the app store)

👀 Find this “Peanut-Chili Silken Tofu” recipe in our app to scale the amounts, get step-by-step photo instructions, and find detailed nutrition info. Or find it below:

INGREDIENTS
~ For 2 servings ~
Tofu
* 14 oz silken tofu
Peanut-chili sauce
* 3 Tbsp peanut butter
* 1½ Tbsp reduced-sodium soy sauce
* 1 Tbsp rice vinegar
* 1 Tbsp maple syrup
* ½ Tbsp chili crisp
* ½ Tbsp toasted sesame oil
Toppings
* 1 Tbsp salted roasted peanuts, finely chopped
* 1 stalk green onion, thinly sliced
* ½ tsp chili crisp (optional)
DIRECTIONS
1. Warm the silken tofu, or enjoy it straight from the package. To steam it, place it on a heatproof plate in a bamboo steamer over simmering water. Cover and steam for 4 to 5 minutes, until warmed through*.
2. Carefully pour off any liquid released from the tofu.
3. In a small bowl, whisk together the peanut sauce ingredients until smooth**.
4. Pour the sauce generously over the warm tofu.
5. Top with the chopped peanuts and green onions. Finish with extra chili crisp if using, and enjoy!
Notes
*Alternatively, place the tofu on a heatproof plate and microwave uncovered for 2 minutes at 600W, or until just warmed through.
** If the mixture is too thick, add a small splash of water.

👩🏻‍🍳 SUBSCRIBE: for more deliciousness @PickUpLimes

title: this LATTE → no more Starbucks ☕
description:
📲 TRY OUR APP: pickuplimes.com/app (or search "Pick Up Limes" on the app store)

👀 Find this “Shaken Brown Sugar Iced Coffee” recipe in our app to scale the amounts, get step-by-step photo instructions, and find detailed nutrition info. Or find it below: 

INGREDIENTS
~ For 2 servings ~

Shaken iced coffee
- 1 cup ice cubes
- ⅓ cup brewed espresso
- ¼ cup water
- 2 Tbsp light brown sugar
- ½ tsp pure vanilla extract
- ¼ tsp ground cinnamon

Assembly
- 1 cup ice cubes
- 1½ cups unsweetened oat milk

DIRECTIONS
1. Add all of the shaken iced coffee ingredients to a [mason jar](https://amzn.to/3LmE2Fy). Seal with a lid and shake for 30 seconds, or until lightly frothy.
2. Fill the glasses with the ice. Optionally, pour the shaken mixture through a [strainer](https://amzn.to/41IEq73) into the glasses to remove the foam.
3. Divide the milk between the glasses, give it a stir, and enjoy

👩🏻‍🍳 SUBSCRIBE: for more deliciousness @PickUpLimes

title: It’s finally here… Simply Plants 🌿
description:
I’ve written a cookbook! Pick Up Limes fiiiinally has a cookbook!! Eeeeek!

It’s called SIMPLY PLANTS and it’s officially available for pre-order (!!) 🥹📖🌿 Link pinned in the comments to preorder ✨

For over 6 years, I’ve been secretly stashing away some of our most loved recipes, saving them especially for this: the day we could include them all in a cookbook. All the recipes were crafted with everyday ingredients, are simple to make, and are so delicious that you’ll want to come back to them again and again. I’m soooo proud of the result and my hope is that this book makes it easier for anyone to EAT MORE PLANTS plant 🌱

Simply Plants officially comes out on October 20th, 2026, but you can preorder it now at the link pinned in the comments (pre-orders help sooo much, so thanks in advance for the vote of confidence) 💛 And be sure to hold on to your receipt as we’ll be sharing pre-order gifts down the line for those who order their copy ahead.

This book would not have been possible without so many incredible people behind it. To name everyone would probably put me over the word limit, but from Robin, to our PUL team, to my editor and agent, our recipe testers, and the entire Clarkson Potter and Avery team, you know who you are, and I’m deeply grateful for each of you.

And you. Yes YOU! 🫵 Truly, thank you for being here. Your support over the years is the only reason this book is possible, and I can’t wait for this book to be in your hands ❤️

title: I can finally share this with you!! 🥹🌿 | Simply Plants
description:
It feels surreal to finally share this cookbook with you. SIMPLY PLANTS is officially available for pre-order (!!) 🥹📖🌿 https://www.pickuplimes.com/book/simply-plants/

This is a true pinch me moment 🤏 This book has been years in the making and sooooo much love has gone into it, from the recipe development and testing to the writing and photography, and I feel incredibly grateful to finally be able to share it with you.

My hope with this book is to make eating more plants feel easier and more enjoyable. Inside are over 100 plant-based recipes made with everyday ingredients and written so they’re easy and approachable for anyone to follow (newbies or seasoned pros alike!). Some recipes are lighter, some are more comforting, and all of them were created to be recipes you’ll actually want to make, eat, and share again and again. 

Simply Plants comes out on October 20, 2026, but you can already pre-order your copy here: https://www.pickuplimes.com/book/simply-plants/ 💛 And please be sure to hold on to your receipt as we’ll be sharing pre-order gifts down the line for those who order their copy ahead (thanks so much for the support!) 🧾🫶

THANK YOU so much for being here and for supporting Pick Up Limes over the years. This book would not exist without you, and I  can’t wait for you to see it ❤️❤️❤️

xo
Sadia
